subject: civic
learning_objectives: Suggest ways to reduce political apathy

sections.heading: Meaning of Political Apathy
sections.content: Political apathy is the lack of interest or participation in political activities such as voting, elections, and civic engagement.

sections.heading: Causes
sections.content: Causes include bad governance, corruption, lack of security, and distrust in political leaders.

sections.heading: Ways to Fight Political Apathy
sections.content: Citizens should be educated politically, participate in elections, understand their rights, and engage in political organizations.
